title: What is a market?
subtitle: Learn how buyers and sellers set price.
content: A market is a place where value is exchanged. Price changes when demand and supply shift.
takeaway: Price reflects imbalance between buyers and sellers.

title: What is a chart?
subtitle: See how data becomes a trading tool.
content: Charts show historical price action. Traders use them to spot direction, momentum, and structure.
takeaway: A chart is a visual record of price behavior.

title: Candlestick anatomy
subtitle: Open, high, low, and close.
content: Each candlestick summarizes one period. The body shows open and close, while wicks show extremes.
takeaway: Candles reveal sentiment in each period.

title: Trends 101
subtitle: Uptrend, downtrend, and sideways movement.
content: An uptrend makes higher highs and higher lows. A downtrend makes lower highs and lower lows.
takeaway: Trend direction is the foundation of analysis.

title: Support and resistance
subtitle: Where price often reacts.
content: Support is an area where buying appears. Resistance is an area where selling appears.
